title: Moosend vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend and AWeber email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and ratings to find the best fit for your business.
intro: Both Moosend and AWeber are established email marketing platforms offering freemium models, but they serve different user needs. Moosend emphasizes unlimited emails and automation workflows at lower costs, while AWeber focuses on simplicity and ease of use for bloggers. We'll help you decide which platform fits your email marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You want unlimited emails on the free plan and lower-cost paid tiers
You need advanced automation workflows and landing pages
You prioritize more feature richness and higher customer ratings
choose_b_if: You're a blogger or solopreneur wanting simple, intuitive design
You need RSS-to-email functionality for content distribution
You prefer a platform established since 1998 with strong brand history

faq.a: Moosend offers better value for most users with unlimited emails, lower pricing, and more advanced features, reflected in its higher G2 (4.7 vs 4.2) and Trustpilot (4.4 vs 4.0) ratings. However, AWeber may be better if you prioritize simplicity and ease of use over feature depth.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or AWeber?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to AWeber's $15/month. Additionally, Moosend's free tier supports 1,000 subscribers with unlimited emails, while AWeber's free tier covers only 500 subscribers with sending restrictions.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list imports and exports, making migration straightforward. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists in CSV format and import them into Moosend without losing your contacts or data.
